meaning: adj.高低不平的,崎岖的,粗糙的,有皱纹的
examples: We left the rough track and bumped our way over a rugged mountainous terrain.
The enemy would always have the advantage of familiarity with the rugged terrain.
Planes parachuted food, clothing, blankets, medicine, and water into the rugged mountainous border region.
The Anti Atlas around Tafraoute has rugged, barren rocks and lush green valleys aplenty.
The lighthouse stands on a rugged tall cliff, connected to the mainland by a narrow steel suspension bridge.
